name: deep-search-replace
description: Build tools for Deep Search & Replace WordPress plugin.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run zip
scripts.zip: mkdir -p build && cd build && rsync -rc --exclude='.*' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='package-lock.json' --exclude='build' --exclude='README.md' ../ deep-search-replace/ && zip -rq deep-search-replace.zip deep-search-replace/ && rm -rf deep-search-replace && echo '\n=========================================' && echo ' Build complete!' && echo '=========================================' && echo '' && echo " ZIP: build/deep-search-replace.zip ($(du -h deep-search-replace.zip | awk '{print $1}'))" && echo '' && echo ' Ready to upload to WordPress.org!' && echo '========================================='
